mapper.select: SELECT dc.id, dc.org_id, dc.clinic_id, c.clinic_name, dc.patient_id, p.patient_name, dc.medical_record_id, mr.record_no AS medical_record_no, dc.chart_type, dc.chart_version, dc.chart_status, dc.updated_at FROM dental_chart dc LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.id = dc.clinic_id LEFT JOIN patient p ON p.id = dc.patient_id LEFT JOIN medical_record mr ON mr.id = dc.medical_record_id WHERE dc.medical_record_id = #{medicalRecordId} AND dc.org_id = #{orgId} ORDER BY dc.id DESC LIMIT 1
